mapper.select: select bc.batch_id , bc.group_nm , bc.batch_nm , qt.trigger_state , qc.cron_expression , case qt.trigger_state when 'WAITING' then '대기' when 'ACQUIRED' then '획득' when 'EXECUTING' then '실행 중' when 'PAUSED' then '일시 정지' when 'BLOCKED' then '차단' when 'COMPLETE' then '완료' when 'ERROR' then '오류' when 'DELETED' then '삭제' else qt.trigger_state end as trigger_state_desc from batchs bc inner join qrtz_triggers qt on bc.sched_name = qt.sched_name and bc.trigger_name = qt.trigger_name and bc.trigger_group = qt.trigger_group inner join qrtz_cron_triggers qc on qt.sched_name = qc.sched_name and qt.trigger_name = qc.trigger_name and qt.trigger_group = qc.trigger_group
